description:
Product Features

  • NATURAL CEDAR WOOD:D-road's Wooden Kid's Picnic Table is made from well-selected natural cedar, which is sturdy and anti-corrosion, made for long-term use.
  • 3-IN-1 DESIGN:3-in-1 design makes this table multifunctional. It can be a picnic table to put outside or an activity table. Remove the tabletop and you can turn this picnic set into either a sand table or a water table and have more fun with the included sink toys.
  • ADJUSTABLE UBRELLA:The umbrella of this Wooden Kid's Picnic Table can be adjusted and protect your kids from the dazzling sunlight. And the umbrella can be removed and folded for space-saving storage.
  • WATER-BASED COATING: Our wooden 3-in-1 picnic table w/umbrella is the water-based coating, which is kids friendly and provides them better playing experience.

Product Information

Item Code:W1390104709

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:3-in-1 Kids Outdoor Wooden Picnic Table With Umbrella, Convertible Sand & Wate, Gray ASTM & CPSIA CERTIFICATION

Main Color:Gray

Main Material:Solid Wood

Keywords:Kids Picnic Table
